character.name: Carter
character.desc:
<c=00ffff>CARTER</c>
A magician who performs card tricks. Specializes in drawing cards and deck control.

stack.name: Stack
stack.desc: The next {0} times you play a card that doesn’t <c=cardtrait>exhaust</c>, put it on top of your <c=keyword>draw pile</c>.

cardistry.name: Cardistry
cardistry.desc: At the end of your turn, move up to {0} cards from your <c=keyword>discard pile</c> to the top of your <c=keyword>draw pile</c>.

Glide.name: Glide
Glide.desc: Gain 1 <c=status>EVADE</c>. Discard a card from <c=keyword>draw pile</c>. Draw {{drw}} cards.
Glide.descB: Gain 1 <c=status>EVADE</c>. Discard two cards from <c=keyword>draw pile</c>. Draw {{drw}} cards.

RazzleDazzle.name: Razzle Dazzle
RazzleDazzle.desc: Attack for <c=boldPink>{{cur}}</c>. On draw, add {{drw}}. On play reduce to {{bse}}.

Flush.name: Flush
Flush.desc: Discard a card to draw {{drw}} cards of that color.
Flush.descA: Draw 1. Discard a card to draw {{drw}} cards of that color.

GlitzAndGlam.name: Glitz and Glam
GlitzAndGlam.desc: Attack for <c=boldPink>{{cur}}</c>. Gain <c=boldPink>{{cur}}</c> shield. On draw, add {{drw}}. On play, reduce to {{bse}}.
GlitzAndGlam.descB: Attack for <c=boldPink>{{cur}}</c>. Gain <c=boldPink>{{cur}}</c> shield. On draw, add {{drw}}. On play, reduce by 1.

TwistingAces.name: Twisting Aces
TwistingAces.desc: Discard and discount {{discount}} cards in your <c=keyword>draw pile</c>.
TwistingAces.descA: Discard and discount {{discount}} cards in your <c=keyword>draw pile</c>. Draw {{draw}}.

CardThrow.name: Card Throw
CardThrow.desc: Attack for <c=attack>{{damage}}</c>. Play and exhaust a card in hand.
CardThrow.descB: Attack for <c=attack>{{damage}}</c> twice. Play and exhaust 2 cards in hand.

DoubleLift.name: Double Lift
DoubleLift.desc: Make a <c=cardtrait>temp</c> copy of the top card of your <c=keyword>draw pile</c>. Draw 1.
DoubleLift.descB: Make a copy of the top card of your <c=keyword>draw pile</c>. Draw 1.

HatTrick.name: Hat Trick
HatTrick.desc: Attack for <c=attack>{{damage}}</c>. Return to hand after playing {{limit}} in a turn. ({{count}}/{{limit}})

ColorfulSequins.name: COLORFUL SEQUINS
ColorfulSequins.desc: On turn 2, draw 1 card from each of your crew members.

FoldedCorner.name: FOLDED CORNER
FoldedCorner.desc: Every 4 times you play a Carter card gain 1 <c=status>STACK</c>.

MagicGloves.name: MAGIC GLOVES
MagicGloves.desc: At the end of your turn, gain 1 <c=status>DRAW NEXT TURN</c> for every Energy you ended your turn with.

MulliganTicket.name: MULLIGAN TICKET
MulliganTicket.desc: The first time each combat you play a card that doesn't exhaust, return it to your hand immediately.

AllSeeingEye.name: ALL-SEEING EYE
AllSeeingEye.desc: Every 2 turns, choose a card in the draw pile or discard to put into your hand. <c=downside>Draw 1 less card every turn.</c>

LightAsAFeather.name: LIGHT AS A FEATHER
LightAsAFeather.desc: All cards gain Lighten. Whenever you play a Lighten card that costs 0, Exhaust it.

TrickDeck.name: TRICK DECK
TrickDeck.desc: Draw 1 additional card every turn. <c=downside>At the start of your turn, move a card in hand to the bottom of the draw pile.</c>

Dizzy.name: CARD SLEEVE
Dizzy.desc: Every 3rd time you draw additional cards during your turn, gain 1 <c=status>TEMP SHIELD</c>.

Riggs.name: GOLD CARD
Riggs.desc: Whenever you play a Riggs card and a Carder card in the same turn, gain 1 <c=status>DRAW NEXT TURN</c>.

Isaac.name: TORN CARD
Isaac.desc: Whenever the enemy destroys a midrow object, draw 1.

Drake.name: ACE OF DIAMONDS
Drake.desc: While you have 3+ <c=downside>HEAT</c>, whenever you draw any cards, draw 1 more.

Max.name: BACKDOOR
Max.desc: Every 2 turns, choose a card to move from the exhaust pile to the bottom of your draw pile.

Books.name: SPARKLING WAND
Books.desc: The first time each turn you play a Crystal Shard, gain 1 <c=status>STACK</c>.

Cat.name: AUTO SHUFFLER
Cat.desc: Whenever you shuffle your deck, temporary cards will be on the top of the deck.

Dyna.name: CARD FRICTION
Dyna.desc: Every 4th time you draw additional cards during your turn, gain 1 <c=status>TEMP NITRO</c>.

ACardSwap.name: Card Swap
ACardSwap.desc:
Choose a card in <c=keyword>{{src}}</c> and a card in <c=keyword>{{dest}}</c>. Swap their positions.
(If one pile is empty, the chosen card will still move)

ACardCost.name: Card Cost
ACardCost.desc: Choose {{cnt}} cards in your hand to {{mode}} to trigger this effect.

ADiscardFromDraw.name: Card Cost
ADiscardFromDraw.desc: Choose <c=boldPink>{{cnt}}</c> cards in the draw pile to discard.

lighten.name: Lighten
lighten.desc: This card costs 1 less after you play it.
